title: Build comparison oracles, benchmarks, and stress tests for API/CLI
description: Comparison oracles O1-O2 (golden file through API, internal vs public equivalence). Benchmarks B1-B3 (Evaluate latency, option overhead, hook JSON roundtrip). Stress S1-S2 (100 goroutines x 1000, concurrent sync.Once). Pack-agnostic test skipping.
